name: Evelynn

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Demon Shade
passive.description_source: Innate: While out of combat,  Evelynn gains Demon Shade.

effects.description: Innate: Evelynn shrouds herself in Demon Shade after not performing actions that break stealth for 4 seconds. Attacking or casting abilities ends Demon Shade immediately and places it on a 4-second static cooldown, reduced to 1.25 seconds from casting Last Caress. Taking damage from champions or turrets interrupts Demon Shade and places it on a 1.5-second static cooldown.
Demon Shade: While below 250 : 630 (based on level) (+ 250% AP) health, Evelynn heals herself for 15 : 165.88 (based on level) every second. From level 6 onward, Demon Shade also grants camouflage.

passive.description: Innate: Evelynn shrouds herself in Demon Shade after not performing actions that break stealth for 4 seconds. Attacking or casting abilities ends Demon Shade immediately and places it on a 4-second static cooldown, reduced to 1.25 seconds from casting Last Caress. Taking damage from champions or turrets interrupts Demon Shade and places it on a 1.5-second static cooldown.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Demon Shade is also placed on a 1.

basic_ability_1.name: Hate Spike
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Evelynn fires her Lasher, dealing magic damage to the first enemy hit and marking them. Evelynn's next few attacks against the marked target will deal bonus magic damage.

effects.context_notes: Active: Evelynn launches a dart in the target direction, dealing magic damage to the first enemy hit and marking them for 4 seconds.
Evelynn's next 3 basic attacks or abilities against the marked target deal bonus magic damage.
Evelynn's next 3 basic attacks or abilities against the marked target deal bonus magic damage.

effects.description: Hate Spike may be recast up to 3 times at no cost until the ability comes off cooldown.

effects.context_notes: Recast: Evelynn unleashes a line of deadly spikes in the direction of the nearest visible enemy that deals magic damage to all enemies struck.
Recast: Evelynn unleashes a line of deadly spikes in the direction of the nearest visible enemy that deals magic damage to all enemies struck.
Recast: Evelynn unleashes a line of deadly spikes in the direction of the nearest visible enemy that deals magic damage to all enemies struck.

effects.description: Hate Spike's recast prioritizes targeting Evelynn's attack target, then the nearest enemy champion, then the nearest non-champion.
A nearby visible enemy is required to recast this ability.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Evelynn launches a dart in the target direction, dealing magic damage to the first enemy hit and marking them for 4 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Each cast counts as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as Spellblade and triggering Force Pulse's passive.

basic_ability_2.name: Allure
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Evelynn curses the target enemy, causing her next  basic attack or  ability against the target to expunge the curse,  slowing the target and refunding the  mana cost.

effects.description: Active: Evelynn curses the target enemy champion or medium or large monster for 5 seconds.
Evelynn's next basic attack or ability against the accursed target expunges them, slowing them by 45% for 0.75 seconds.

effects.context_notes: Expunging a target will refund Allure's mana cost.
Against champions, the expunge also inflicts magic resistance reduction for 4 seconds.
Against monsters, the expunge deals bonus magic damage and increases the duration of the charm by 2 seconds.
Against monsters, the expunge deals bonus magic damage and increases the duration of the charm by 2 seconds.

effects.description: Casting Allure does not break Demon Shade nor its fade into it.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Evelynn curses the target enemy champion or medium or large monster for 5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The mark fully forming signifies the 2.

basic_ability_3.name: Whiplash
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Evelynn whips the target enemy, dealing magic damage based on the target's maximum health and applying  on-hit effects. She then gains  bonus movement speed for a short time.

effects.context_notes: Active: Evelynn whips the target enemy with her lashers, dealing magic damage and applying on-hit effects.
Evelynn also gains bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.

effects.description: Gaining Demon Shade resets Whiplash's cooldown and empowers its next cast. The damage based on the target's health ratio for both Whiplash and its empowered cast deals a minimum of 25 and is capped at 450 against monsters.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Evelynn whips the target enemy with her lashers, dealing magic damage and applying on-hit effects.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Whiplash can be dodged and blocked but may not miss if Evelynn is blinded.

ultimate.name: Last Caress

effects.context_notes: Active: Evelynn reveals her true form, becoming untargetable at the start of the cast time and then unleashing her lashers in a cone in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies struck within.
Last Caress is empowered to deal 240% damage against enemies below 30% of their maximum health.

ultimate.description: Active: Evelynn reveals her true form, becoming untargetable at the start of the cast time and then unleashing her lashers in a cone in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies struck within. After 0.5 seconds, she blinks 700 units in the opposite direction and becomes targetable again.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Last Caress can be buffered during Empowered Whiplash.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
